Creates a work item domain action proposal.

## Import

```ts
import { workItemDomainActionProposal } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item/actions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function workItemDomainActionProposal(
	proposalId: string,
	workItemId: string,
	actionKind: WorkItemDomainActionKind,
	opts: Omit<
		Partial<WorkItemDomainActionProposal>,
		"kind" | "proposalId" | "workItemId" | "actionKind"
	> = {},
): WorkItemDomainActionProposal
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `proposalId` | `string` | Stable identifier used by the emitted record. |
| `workItemId` | `string` | Stable identifier used by the emitted record. |
| `actionKind` | `WorkItemDomainActionKind` | action kind value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `Omit< 		Partial<WorkItemDomainActionProposal>, 		"kind" \| "proposalId" \| "workItemId" \| "actionKind" 	>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The work item domain action proposal result.

